arts.ttl: Juventus Closing in on Kolo Muani: Deal Could Be Finalised Soon
arts.sum: According to Gazzetta dello Sport, Juventus are making significant progress in their pursuit of Paris Saint-Germain striker Randal Kolo Muani. The Italian giants are seeking an alternative to Dusan Vlahovic, and Juventus' sporting director Cristiano Giuntoli has identified the French forward as the best opportunity in the current market. The post Juventus Closing in on Kolo Muani: Deal Could Be Finalised Soon appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Torino vs Juventus for city supremacy
arts.sum: In 10 of their last 13 league games against Torino, Juventus have scored at least one goal from the 70th minute onwards; in general, 12 goals have been scored in this phase of the match by the Bianconeri against the Granata in the last seven seasons, a record for a Serie A team against a single opponent in this period (since 2018/19). Derby della Mole between Torino and Juventus: both will want to win to chase their respective goals
